channel.title: Cointelegraph.com News
channel.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

image.title: Cointelegraph.com News
image.description: Cointelegraph covers fintech, blockchain and Bitcoin bringing you the latest crypto news and analyses on the future of money.

item.title: Bitcoin’s ‘momentum is fading’: Traders have these support levels in mind
item.description: Bitcoin momentum is fading following drop to $76,000 as analysts warn a loss of key support at $74,000-$76,000 could trigger a deeper BTC price correction.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: South Carolina governor signs bill protecting Bitcoin miners, banning CBDC
item.description: Senate Bill 163 bans CBDC payments by state agencies and shields Bitcoin miners from discriminatory zoning and licensing rules.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Euro stablecoin project Qivalis adds 25 banks ahead of launch
item.description: Qivalis expands to 37 banks after adding 25 new members across 15 countries, boosting euro stablecoin plans ahead of a second-half 2026 launch.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: OpenAI launches overseas AI lab in Singapore with $234M commitment
item.description: OpenAI is opening its first overseas applied AI lab in Singapore through a $234 million partnership expected to create more than 200 technical roles.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitwise calls HYPE ‘most mispriced’ crypto despite 77% rise this year
item.description: Bitwise’s Matt Hougan says Hyperliquid’s token is not priced as if it is tied to a “global super-app,” arguing the platform is more than just a crypto platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Trump orders review of fintech firms' access to Fed payment services
item.description: Financial regulators are also asked to review regulations that could be amended to streamline applications for eligible fintech firms seeking bank and credit union charters.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: GitHub investigates unauthorized access to internal repositories
item.description: GitHub said the activity involved the exfiltration of about 3,800 internal repositories, and it removed the malicious code extension.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Meta begins 8K global job cuts, starting in Singapore
item.description: Approximately 49,000 workers were laid off in 2026 as companies adopted a more AI-reliant business model.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: US Senate advances resolution to curb Trump’s Iran war powers
item.description: “Congress has the power to slam the brakes on this unwise conflict,” said bill sponsor and Democratic Senator Tim Kaine.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: WLFI-linked AI Financial flags ‘going concern’ as losses mount
item.description: AI Financial Corp. posted a net loss of $271.5 million in the first quarter of 2026 as it flagged significant doubt about its ability to continue operating for the next 12 months.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Jesse Coghlan

item.title: Bankr temporarily disables transactions after 14 wallets hacked
item.description: Bankr recommends that affected users create a new wallet, generate a new seed phrase on a clean device and revoke approvals if remaining assets can’t be moved.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Stephen Katte

item.title: Trump-backed Truth Social pulls bids for crypto ETFs
item.description: The crypto ETFs were intended to be part of Trump Media & Technology Group’s broader crypto strategy, which included the launch of the Truth.fi financial platform.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Brayden Lindrea

item.title: Solana futures funding rate turns negative: Is $78 SOL next?
item.description: Solana futures funding turned negative as demand for SOL and its associated decentralized exchanges fell. Will traders buy the dip or is $78 next?
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Marcel Pechman

item.title: CFTC sues Minnesota, Governor Tim Walz over prediction markets ban
item.description: About 24 hours after Minnesota Governor Tim Walz signed a bill into law passed by the state’s legislature to effectively ban prediction markets in the state, the CFTC pushed back with its own lawsuit.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: Bernstein: Bitcoin miners becoming critical suppliers in AI infrastructure
item.description: Bernstein says miners control 27 GW of planned power and $90 billion in AI deals, giving them a strategic edge as electricity becomes the main constraint on data center growth.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Data shows Bitcoin dip buyers waiting for lower prices: Is $70K BTC’s next stop?
item.description: Bitcoin futures and orderbook data show dip buyers waiting for a BTC price drop below $70,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Biraajmaan Tamuly

item.title: Polymarket partners with Nasdaq to list private company contracts
item.description: New markets will let users trade on fundraising, valuation and other startup milestones using data from Nasdaq Private Market, extending forecasting into private capital.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: Senator Warren questions OCC chief on approval of ‘ineligible’ crypto trust charters
item.description: The Massachusetts lawmaker asked the US Comptroller of the Currency to provide all communications between the agency and President Donald Trump potentially related to the charter approvals.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Turner Wright

item.title: BoE deputy says tokenization could cut costs, boost competition
item.description: The UK central bank said digital money should remain trusted and interoperable as it weighs stablecoin reforms and near-24/7 settlement to support tokenized markets.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Sam Bourgi

item.title: XRP price risks 50% drop despite 9-day ETF inflow streak
item.description: Spot XRP ETFs record net inflows for nine days, absorbing sell pressure and potentially supporting an XRP price recovery over time.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin price stays under $77K as US bond yields near 20-year highs
item.description: BTC price stayed pinned below $77,000 amid rising US bond yields and oil prices, with market analysts saying Bitcoin is now at a "crucial level of support."
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by William Suberg

item.title: A viral hedgehog, Vitalik Buterin, and a bow: the GraphDex launch that crypto won't forget
item.description: 5,800 users in two hours. One QR code. One bow that went viral.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Advertorial

item.title: Tor Project to lead Web3 crowdfunding to support internet freedom
item.description: Global internet freedom has declined for 15 consecutive years, with more countries restricting access to more of the internet, according to Freedom House.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Martin Young

item.title: Recent Bitcoin holders sell $770M BTC at a loss amid $65K BTC price calls
item.description: More than 10,000 Bitcoin have been sold at a loss by short-term holders in recent days, adding fuel to analysts’ predictions that BTC price will fall to $65,000.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nancy Lubale

item.title: Bitcoin miner Canaan posts $88.7M net loss in Q1 amid BTC decline
item.description: Canaan’s Q1 results were dragged down by a $25 million inventory write-down and a 75% quarterly drop in equipment sales as Bitcoin prices retreated from their highs.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Estonian regulator partially suspends Zondacrypto operator license
item.description: Estonia’s FIU has partially suspended BB Trade Estonia OÜ’s license, giving the Zondacrypto operator 30 days to fix compliance issues or risk full revocation.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Helen Partz

item.title: Zcash is 'running its own bull market' as ZEC price paints 88% rally setup
item.description: ZEC has jumped 18% in three days as privacy coins rally, defying a 3.45% drop across the wider crypto market.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Yashu Gola

item.title: South Korean funeral company records $33M unrealized loss on leveraged ETH ETFs
item.description: South Korea’s seventh-largest mutual aid company is currently sitting on a $33 million paper loss on its leveraged Ether ETF investment, following the crypto market downturn.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Zoltan Vardai

item.title: Pump.fun accounts for over one-third of Solana’s Q1 revenue despite memecoin slowdown
item.description: Pump.fun pulled in $124.7 million in Q1 2026, making it Solana’s largest revenue generator even as memecoin activity cooled, while the network’s RWA market cap crossed $2 billion.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Amin Haqshanas

item.title: Bitget Wallet integrates Kraken-backed xStocks tokenized equities
item.description: The self-custodial wallet platform integrated Kraken-backed xStocks infrastructure, adding more than 130 tokenized stocks and ETFs for users.
item.dc:creator: Cointelegraph by Nate Kostar
